response: Note: This is in an alternate universe, This shop, despite being awesome, never existed, It does in this alternate universe We’ve loved being in this spot as part of the wonderful [City] community Unfortunately, This shop is now closed, The realities of retail in the shopping landscape has made this decision unavoidable, We want to take the opportunity to thank you for shopping with us for so many years, You can find all about [Brand] and its related online MMO [Game] at [Website] Goodbye forever… This sign was posted to the doors of [Shop Name], a children’s shop in [City] on [Day] The image ends with a poignant “Goodbye forever…” above a image of a crying Krash the Rabbit The store closed on [Day] after [Number] years trading at [Street], [City], The shop sold merchandise related to the animated series [Show Name], The cartoon is a [Country] cartoon about circular colorful animals and their fun adventures, The [Shop Name] shop opened in [Year] was originally [Original Name] and was a general toy shop akin to [Similar Store] but in [Year] became [Shop Name] and became focused on the then new surge in [Show Name] popularity in [Region], However in [Month] [Year], the store closed for the last time, [Shop Name] Group’s reasoning was the “realities of retail” was unavoidable, The shop was also closed so [Shop Name] could focus on business in it’s native [Country] and develop more exciting new animated series or movies [Website Name] - Goodbye [Shop Name] [Author Name] posted on [Date] It’s the end of an era, Even bigger than the end of [Show/Event], or even [Person] leaving [Show/Role], The famous [Shop Name] store has gone, After about [Number] years of selling toys and [Number] years of its golden age of [Show Name] merchandise the store has unfortunately vanished, in its place is a rather upsetting image of Krash crying, It pains my heart to see the poor guy like this, Apparently “the realities of retail in the shopping landscape have made this change unavoidable” Whats most striking is “Goodbye forever…” written in a melancholic font, and the most striking part is that it’s showing Krash crying. My kids will miss the shop dearly. There is another sign giving the channel numbers for [TV Channel], the channel that broadcasts the [Show Name]
